# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted DSA practice gets UX and performance polish
- Summary: Highlighting recent dev focus: faster Phaser asset preloading, enhanced onboarding, and Azure OpenAI assistant improvements that elevate DSA practice.
- Slug: codegrind-recent-dev-ui-and-ai-improvements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-recent-dev-ui-and-ai-improvements
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-06-codegrind-recent-dev-ui-and-ai-improvements.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind is shipping focused improvements to AI-assisted problem solving, faster asset loading for smoother gameplay, and a refreshed onboarding flow. These updates reduce friction in practice sessions and make problem solving with AI more seamless, while keeping the tower-defense gamified concept intact.
- CTA: Explore the latest CodeGrind updates and try a new AI-assisted problem now.
- Visual brief: Static renderer of a sleek CodeGrind dashboard showing AI chat panel alongside a fast-loading Phaser-based game view, with subtle cyberpunk accents and a badge saying 'AI Assistant Enhanced'.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
